goal: Harden real adapter endpoint evidence from marker-shaped markdown to structured JSON verification. capture_real_adapter_endpoint_evidence.py must write a JSON sidecar with live/self-test source, adapter intake hashes, endpoint statuses, output equivalence, fake-backend absence, and read-only model-cache mount state. verify_m6_rc_evidence.py must prefer and validate the JSON sidecar so markdown-only or self-test evidence cannot close M6-RC. This gate does not provide a real adapter and must preserve current M6-RC NOT_GO.
head: c4d0227
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC GO before live structured endpoint evidence exists
Weakening real adapter endpoint evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may harden evidence tooling, focused tests, generated tooling evidence, and handoff docs only.
required_evidence: Capture self-test writes structured JSON sidecar
verify_m6_rc_evidence.py rejects self-test JSON as RC GO evidence
verify_m6_rc_evidence.py requires structured live JSON fields before GO
Current M6 verifier remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint blocker
warnings: This gate does not provide a real trained adapter.
This gate does not run live Docker endpoint transcripts.
M6-RC remains NOT_GO until live structured endpoint evidence exists.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped evidence-hardening contract for structured real endpoint evidence.
phase_notes.audit: Read current WORKING.md, capture_real_adapter_endpoint_evidence.py, verify_m6_rc_evidence.py, and script tests. Found M6 verifier still relies on markdown markers for endpoint evidence.
phase_notes.build: Added structured endpoint JSON sidecar generation, lowercase SHA-256 intake hash enforcement, verifier sidecar validation, and focused tests for self-test/markdown-only/readonly-mount rejection.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused pytest, endpoint capture self-test with JSON sidecar, M6-RC verifier expected NOT_GO, generated JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: Structured endpoint evidence tooling is complete. M6-RC remains NOT_GO because live real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence is still absent.

pabcd.approved_scope: Structured endpoint evidence tooling, focused tests, generated evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no M6 GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
